paper.title: Evaluation of the durability of titanium dioxide photocatalyst coating for concrete pavement
paper.authors: Marwa M. Hassan; Heather Dylla; Louay N. Mohammad; Tyson Rupnow
paper.material_system: titanium dioxide photocatalyst coating for concrete pavement
paper.notes: Packet concerns TiO2 coating durability and NOx removal; no compressive-strength data supported.
